LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U ED ; RESPONDENT SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION LOCAL 1877'S MOTION TO CONFIRM FIRST SUPPLEMENTAL DECISION AND AWARD. ALTHOUGH THE ARBITRATOR'S FAILURE TO ALLOW DISCOVERY COUPLED WITH CERTAIN RULINGS RAISE QUESTIONS ABOUT PROPOSED AWARD, THERE DOES NOT APPEAR A BASIS FOR DENYING THE MOTION. THE MOTION IS GRANTED TO CONFIRM THE AWARD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PATRICK MAHONEY, REPORTER: NICI RODICH, CSR NO. 11604
